name: Payment Method Fraud Indicator
description: Flags missing or unusual payment methods as potential fraud indicator

evidence.expected: A valid payment method (Cash, QRIS, Card, etc.)
evidence.recommendation: Investigate receipts with missing payment methods.

message: Payment method not detected — potential fraud indicator
recommendation: Investigate receipts with missing payment methods.

name: Empty Items Fraud Indicator
description: Flags receipts with no line items as suspicious

evidence.expected: At least one line item present
evidence.recommendation: Investigate receipts with no items — possible manipulation.

message: No items detected — receipt may be fraudulent
recommendation: Investigate receipts with no items — possible manipulation.

name: Missing Store Name Fraud Indicator
description: Flags receipts with no store name as potentially fraudulent
message: Store name missing — possible fraudulent receipt
